description: Salesforce (Lightning/Aura, REST/SOAP API, OAuth2) priors. Protects business API + auth producers and folds telemetry.
llmFlowNotes: Salesforce: /services/oauth2/token is the OAuth2 grant — never fold it. The access_token feeds Authorization: Bearer on every /services/data call.

Salesforce Lightning/Aura: each Aura POST carries aura.token and aura.context (fwuid, app). fwuid and aura.token are server-issued per session — extract the fresh values from the bootstrap response; do not replay recorded literals.
Salesforce: frontdoor.jsp establishes the UI session (sid). Protect it; it is a session producer, not a redirect hop.
Salesforce: SOAP login returns a sessionId in the XML envelope — extract it and send as the Authorization/session header on subsequent calls.
expectations: OAuth2 token + Aura framework token + frontdoor session protected as business/session producers
Aura fwuid/token correlated from bootstrap, not replayed as recorded literals
